name: aws_s3
summary: Reads objects from an AWS S3 bucket, emitting each object's content as a message.

bucket.description: S3 bucket name to read from.

region.description: AWS region (e.g. "eu-central-1"). Defaults to AWS_REGION env var.

endpoint.description: Custom endpoint URL for S3-compatible services (e.g. MinIO).

delete_objects.description: Delete objects from S3 after they have been successfully processed.

credentials.description: AWS credentials. Omit to use the default credential chain (env vars, instance profile, etc.).
